input_preview: The righthand sidebar in the TUI that should show overall status does not open or present. Look at t; Analyze the root cause of a missing right-hand sidebar in a Bubble Tea/Lip Gloss TUI. Focus on width
output_preview:
The primary root cause is that the main column is being widened to the full terminal width before the sidebar is joined, so the sidebar is rendered off the right edge rather than not being created.
